text:
Ridge (リッジ, Rijji) is a Hunter Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 362 and Royal Bodyguard for Prince Luzurus. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 386 

Appearance

Ridge has dark skin, a big nose, and thick lips. His dark hair is arranged in a ridge-like haircut. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 383 He has a dark, vertical line resembling a tear painted or tattooed under each of his eyes. During his rap battle performance, he wore a black long-sleeved shirt underneath a patterned shirt, whereas he dons a black suit with a white tie while on duty as a bodyguard. 

Personality

Little is known about Ridge's personality, but he seems to take freestyle rap battles rather seriously. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Because of Kurapika's announcement through the emergency channel that revealed the existence of Nen beasts, Prince Luzurus summons his hired Hunters Ridge, Scairt, and Basho to learn more about his Guardian Spirit Beast and Nen. Scairt informs the Prince about the conditions of a Nen beast and how it would take approximately a year to master Nen. Disinterested in learning Nen, the prince, informs the Hunters that their original plan involving his older sister Prince Tubeppa will proceed. He also notes his delight that a stalemate could happen because of the Nen beasts and they could dominate the competition if the other prince's guards are ignorant of Nen. The prince then orders the Hunters to guard him in rotations and report to him if they witness a Nen beast. 

During the first banquet, Ridge participates in a freestyle rap battle against Basho. The following day, he is sitting on a sofa by a table with Basho. After a rumbling noise, the doorbell rings and it's "Shikaku" who pledges his allegiance to Prince Benjamin and then commits suicide. Under Famule's orders, Ridge and Basho stay in the Prince's room while the personal bodyguards search and examine the area of Shikaku's suicide. He is present when Kanjidol questions him and the other bodyguards to further elaborate any information they have on his comrade's abrupt suicide. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 389 

Abilities & Powers

Ridge has all the benefits granted by his status as a Hunter. 

Nen

As a Pro-Hunter, Ridge is capable of using Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 7, Chapter 60 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

His original Japanese name, リッジ (Rijji), could be a loan-word from the English "ridge" and a loose reference to the character's hairstyle.
At the time of his introduction, Ridge was white-skinned and had a different hairstyle.
